---
name: Bug Report
about: Report an issue or crash to help improve Glance.
title: "[BUG] "
labels: bug, triage
assignees: ''

---

**Describe the bug**
A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

**To Reproduce**
Steps to reproduce the behavior (e.g., "1. Go to Settings, 2. Map shortcut "A"...")

**Expected behavior**
A clear and concise description of what you expected to happen.

**Screenshots / Screen Recording**
If applicable, drag and drop screenshots or a short video here to help explain your problem.

**Environment (please complete the following information):**
 - OS: [e.g. macOS Sonoma 14.2, Windows 11]
 - Glance Version: [e.g. v1.0.0]
 - Did you attach your exported `Glance_Diagnostics.zip`? [Yes/No]

**Diagnostic Logs**
*(Privacy check)* You can optionally upload your exported `Glance_Diagnostics.zip` from your Desktop by dragging and dropping it into this box. It helps speed up fixes immensely.
